MOVING PARTY SHALL PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE OPERATIVE COMPLAINT. OPPOSING PARTY SHALL PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF OPPOSITION. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2017 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-12-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rachel C. Witcher (714-918-7000) for Defendant/Moving party NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC, U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, and BEAR STEARNS ARM TRUST, MORTGAGE PASS-THROUGH CERTIFICATES, SERIES 2005-6.
No other appearances.

The Court inquires re: compliance with tentative ruling rule. Defense failed to comply. Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC, U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, and BEAR STEARNS ARM TRUST, MORTGAGE PASS-THROUGH CERTIFICATES, SERIES 2005-6 DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to address in good faith all issues raised by the demurrer. The Court notes that Plaintiff failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B and Court's September 14, 2017 minute order. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-14-2017 Continued To Oct-12-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTs NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC, U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION,, BEAR STEARNS ARM TRUST and MORTGAGE PASS-THROUGH CERTIFICATES, SERIES 2005-6's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Continued to October 12, 2017 for parties to comply with SFLR 2.7B. Moving party shall provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint. Opposing party shall provide a courtesy copy of opposition. Courtesy copies shall be delivered to department 501 no later than September 22, 2017 with cover letters reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
